blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, shadows, or other elements are obstructing the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, and item description. The presence of these fields, along with the detailed expense claim form, confirms that this is an expense document. The expense type is classified as 'travel' due to the nature of the expenses claimed (train ticket, taxi rides, hotel nights).

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of the 8 required fields, meeting the criteria for expense identification. The fields found include supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, and item description. The detailed expense claim form and the presence of specific expense amounts and dates confirm that this is an expense document.

purpose_of_travel.description: Participation in 2024 World Health Summit, Berlin

line_items.description: Zugticket fuer Anreise nach Berlin Ticket only to CH-German border, from their no cost for CEPI as I used an already purchased interrail ticket. This ticket was also used on the way back.
Taxi in from Train Station Berlin to Hotel (late arrival)
Taxi in Berlin to the Train Station
Two hotel nights extra to the WHS conference package due participation at the UNITE Global Summit

issues.description: The supplier business name is missing from the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipts and invoices must be submitted alongside expense items

issues.description: The ICP company details are missing from the invoice.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: The Local Employer's name and details should appear on invoices, except where this won't be possible e.g. flight bookings

issues.description: The restaurant expenses exceed the tax-free limits.
issues.recommendation: Any portion of per diem amount that exceeds the set rate will be taxable and must have a receipt provided.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Domestic and International: Breakfast CHF 15.00, Lunch CHF 35.00, Dinner CHF 40.00 tax-free. Any portion of per diem amount that exceeds the set rate will be taxable and must have a receipt provided

issues.description: A logbook and map with the relevant route are required for mileage expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide a logbook with complete route details and odometer readings, and a map with the relevant route (Google Maps is sufficient).
issues.knowledge_base_reference: A logbook is required for each used car. Worker will need to share a map with the relevant route (google maps is sufficient)

issues.description: Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip.
issues.recommendation: Please submit a separate report for each business trip.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Workers should submit a separate report per each business trip

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing the supplier business name and ICP company details. The restaurant expenses exceed the tax-free limits and will be subject to tax. Additional documentation such as a logbook and map with the relevant route is required for mileage expenses. A separate report per each business trip should be submitted.
